description: A professor calls from a classroom 10 minutes before class starts because the projector is not turning on.

nodes.task_description: Identify the professor and the classroom number.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the exact location of the issue.

nodes.task_description: Attempt a remote restart of the classroom's A/V system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent uses the remote management tool to power cycle the projector.

nodes.task_description: If the remote restart fails, dispatch an on-site technician immediately.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a high-priority ticket and dispatches the nearest technician.
